captions.formal: A fixed time-lapse from an elevated vantage point captures heavy two-way traffic streaking along a multi-lane urban road lined with autumn trees and high-rise apartments, with distant mountains visible beneath a hazy late-afternoon sky.
captions.sarcastic: Nothing says relaxing autumn evening quite like watching endless streaks of cars blur past golden trees while distant mountains politely pretend not to notice the traffic.
captions.humorous_tech: The cars race through the intersection as motion-blurred streaks like data packets flooding a single overloaded router, while the traffic signals bravely try to throttle the bandwidth beneath those cheerful orange autumn trees.
captions.humorous_non_tech: The cars blur past like everyone's suddenly remembered they left something on the stove, while the yellow and orange trees just stand there enjoying the warm afternoon sun without a care in the world.

captions.formal: An orange-and-white long-haired kitten walks steadily along a dirt path toward the camera in a shaded wooded area with dappled sunlight filtering through overhead foliage.
captions.sarcastic: Nothing says fearsome jungle predator quite like a fluffy orange kitten strolling down a dirt path with its tail proudly raised in triumph.
captions.humorous_tech: The orange kitten advances frame by frame like a progress bar loading toward the camera, and by the time its tail goes fully upright, the download has finally hit one hundred percent.
captions.humorous_non_tech: This little orange-and-white kitten is approaching down the leafy dirt path with the confident tail-up strut of someone who just heard the dinner bowl being filled.

captions.formal: A young woman in a light beige shirt over an orange top works at a desktop computer in a modern open-plan office with circular ceiling lights and a green potted plant in the background.
captions.sarcastic: Nothing says peak productivity like staring intently at a monitor beside a nest of tangled cables that clearly no one has dared to touch in months.
captions.humorous_tech: She types with the focused calm of someone who just pushed to production on a Friday, blissfully unaware that the tangled cables under her white desk are the least of her merge conflicts.
captions.humorous_non_tech: That neutral, laser-focused stare says she skipped breakfast and is now running purely on determination and the faint hope of a coffee break, cross necklace and pink nails holding it all together.
